title: Cloudflare D1 Database
description: A D1 serverless SQL database object from the Cloudflare API, representing an SQLite-compatible database running on Cloudflare's global network with support for time travel and automatic replication.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the D1 database.

version.description: The internal version of the database.

num_tables.description: The number of tables in the database.

file_size.description: The size of the database file in bytes.

running_in_region.description: The region where the primary database is running.
